inputs.label: Net Sales Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from taxable sales before any tax or discounts.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Combined state and local sales tax rate as a percentage.

inputs.label: Exempt Sales Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of net sales that are tax-exempt (e.g., resale, non-profit).

inputs.label: Tax Jurisdiction
inputs.businessContext: Level of tax authority: state only, state+county, or state+county+city.

inputs.label: Sourcing Method
inputs.businessContext: Origin-based (seller's location) or destination-based (buyer's location) tax sourcing.

inputs.label: Include Shipping in Taxable Base
inputs.businessContext: Whether shipping and handling charges are subject to sales tax.

inputs.label: Shipping & Handling Charge
inputs.businessContext: Total shipping and handling fees charged to customers.

rules.message: Exempt ratio must be between 0 and 100.
If shipping is not included, shipping charge must be zero to avoid double counting.

thresholds.message: Tax rate exceeds 12% – consider reviewing exemptions or sourcing strategy.
Exempt ratio > 50% – verify exemption documentation to avoid audit risk.
Net sales below $1,000 – tax calculation may be negligible.

formulas.name: Taxable Base
formulas.description: Net sales minus exempt portion, plus shipping if included.

formulas.name: Effective Tax Rate
formulas.description: Tax rate adjusted for jurisdiction complexity (simplified multiplier).

formulas.name: Gross Tax Amount
formulas.description: Tax before any adjustments or rounding.

formulas.name: Sourcing Adjustment Factor
formulas.description: Multiplier based on sourcing method (origin=1.0, destination=1.02).

formulas.name: Adjusted Tax Amount
formulas.description: Gross tax multiplied by sourcing adjustment.

formulas.name: Rounding Loss
formulas.description: Difference due to rounding to nearest cent (per transaction).

formulas.name: Total Tax Liability (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Final sales tax amount after rounding, to be remitted.

primary.label: Total Sales Tax Liability
primary.description: Final rounded sales tax amount to remit.

taxable_base.label: Taxable Base
taxable_base.description: Net sales minus exemptions plus shipping if applicable.

effective_tax_rate.label: Effective Tax Rate
effective_tax_rate.description: Tax rate adjusted for jurisdiction complexity.

gross_tax_amount.label: Gross Tax Amount
gross_tax_amount.description: Tax before sourcing adjustment and rounding.

sourcing_adjustment.label: Sourcing Adjustment Factor
sourcing_adjustment.description: Multiplier for origin vs destination sourcing.

rounding_loss.label: Rounding Loss
rounding_loss.description: Difference due to rounding to nearest cent.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Exempt Ratio Erosion
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High exempt ratio reduces taxable base, potentially indicating improper exemptions.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Sourcing Mismatch
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Destination-based sourcing may increase tax liability if rates are higher at buyer location.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Shipping Taxability
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Including shipping in taxable base increases total tax, may be avoidable in some jurisdictions.

suggestedActions.label: Review Exemption Certificates
suggestedActions.description: Ensure all exempt sales have valid certificates to reduce audit risk.

suggestedActions.label: Evaluate Sourcing Method
suggestedActions.description: If origin-based sourcing yields lower tax, confirm legal applicability.

suggestedActions.label: Review Shipping Tax Policy
suggestedActions.description: Consider separating shipping charges or using tax-exempt shipping where allowed.

suggestedActions.label: Monitor Rate Changes
suggestedActions.description: Set up alerts for jurisdiction tax rate updates to avoid under/overpayment.
